title: DiamondFPS
body:
The modpack, DiamondFPS was made by me to replicate the feel of lunar client but having mods that allow you to chat with others and a coding tool for Diamondfire. (mc server)

Unlike other modpacks like Fabulously Optimized this mod does the same thing but, uses less mods which gives an extra performance increase by removing unnecessary mods.

I decided to make this modpack for other users to gain more performance without having to change and remove multiple mods. This modpack also helps you on a Minecraft server name Diamondfire.

DiamondFPS is there to make your client feel like Lunar Client with the addition of being able to your own mods. This modpack isn't like other modpacks such as Fabulously Optimized, DiamondFPS has all the necessary mods without having extra mods so its less of a hassle

Main Features 

DiamondFPS is a modpack that enhances Minecraft to boost your fps and to feel like lunar client. It also has recode, A mod made for a server called Diamondfire. 

You should download DiamondFPS because, It has a anti-crash  (Not Enough Crashes) which prevents you from getting crashed and tells you which mod crashed it and gives you the crash report without actually crashing you. DiamondFPS also has zoom and a chatting feature from a mod named Essential. Essential adds many QOL features and lets other players in Essential play in your singleplayer world.


DiamondFPS also has a mod called ViaFabricPlus which lets you use different versions of minecraft. ViaFabricPlus may crash minecraft so feel free to remove it anytime
